caption: The video captures a formal meeting of the House Committee on General, Housing, and Military Affairs, dated April 12, 2019, focusing on S.23, a bill to increase the minimum wage. The scene is set in a professional environment with several individuals seated around a table, some engaged in discussion while others listen attentively. A man in a suit appears to be addressing the committee, gesturing as he speaks. Behind him, a woman in a white cardigan and black top stands near another individual in an orange jacket, both observing the proceedings. The room is equipped with laptops, documents, and office supplies, indicating a structured and organized setting for the discussion. The atmosphere suggests a serious and focused debate on the proposed legislation.
